content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow dev speed
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and architectural reasoning. By shifting your workflow to AI-assisted CLI execution, you transform manual coding tasks into high-level orchestration, allowing you to build complex features in minutes rather than hours. This is your competitive edge.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a graveyard for ambition. You sit down to build, but the friction of scaffolding, dependency management, and repetitive syntax drags your velocity to a crawl. Every minute spent fighting configuration is a minute stolen from the architectural innovation that actually defines your career.

But the paradigm has shifted. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you move from 'coder' to 'system architect.' You aren't just writing lines anymore; you are commanding a fleet of agents to manifest your logic. This is the blueprint for building at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Initialize Contextual Awareness
steps.description: Establish the project scope and constraints within the Claude environment to prevent hallucination and maintain architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project directory and create a concise architectural manifest focusing on the current tech stack and modular dependencies.

steps.title: Automated Dependency Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate high-quality boilerplate, ensuring your project structure follows industry best practices from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust, production-ready directory structure for a Next.js 14 app with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Prisma integration.

steps.title: Dynamic Component Generation
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to build UI components based on your specific design requirements without manual boilerplate typing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable, accessible button component using Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS variants.

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Run automated refactoring cycles to improve code quality and optimize performance based on real-time linting feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and apply memoization patterns where applicable.

steps.title: Integration Testing Automation
steps.description: Generate comprehensive test suites that validate your business logic against edge cases, ensuring your features never regress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests for the user authentication flow, including error handling for invalid credentials.

pro_tips: Always define a .clauderules file in your root to force the model to adhere to your specific coding standards and naming conventions.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review every architectural change before committing, treating the AI as a junior partner.
Leverage Antigravity's 'ghost mode' to simulate state changes across your application without actually executing side effects.
Chain your prompts: use Claude to plan the feature, then use Antigravity to execute the implementation commands sequentially.
Treat your CLI history as a knowledge base; periodically audit your successful Claude commands to build your own library of custom scripts.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, focus on building one full-stack feature per week. Document your CLI workflows to create a custom 'AI-Builder' toolkit that you can reuse in future projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the editor and start building the future. Your journey from student to senior-level architect begins with how you leverage your tools today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
